message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate async, calls, and misc patterns to withInlineBlock

- async.zig: Migrate 7 patterns (asyncio_run, gather, sleep, await)
- async_state_machine.zig: Migrate 2 patterns (sum, listcomp)
- calls.zig: Migrate 2 patterns (kwarg_err, kwargs)
- misc.zig: Migrate 2 patterns (void_assert, typeerr)

Reduces emitInlineBlockStart occurrences from 39 to 32.
